summary: Guided Minutes feature comprehensive testing complete. All 15 features verified working correctly - 4-step wizard flow for AI-assisted meeting minutes creation.
passed_tests: Guided Minutes page loads at /guided-minutes route
Sidebar shows 'Guided Minutes' link with gold 'BETA' badge under Governance
Minutes page has 'Guided Minutes' button with beta badge linking to wizard
Trust context API returns trust name, jurisdiction, and trustees
Step 1: Meeting date picker works with calendar popup
Step 1: Participants can be selected from known trustees (John Smith, Jane Smith)
Step 1: Custom participants can be added via input field
Step 2: Agenda items can be added/removed
Step 2: Key decisions can be added/removed
Step 2: Generate Draft with AI button calls backend and generates formal minutes
Step 3: AI draft is displayed in editable textarea with WHEREAS/RESOLVED format
Step 3: Draft title and body are editable
Step 4: Save Minutes creates minutes_records entry (verified via API)
Step 4: Success screen shows 'Minutes Saved' confirmation
Step 4: View All Minutes and Create Another buttons work
Navigation: Back/Next buttons work correctly between steps
Stepper shows correct active step indicator
critical_code_review_comments: PASS: Backend router /api/guided-minutes properly implements all 3 endpoints (context, draft, save)
PASS: GuidedMinutesDraftRequest validates required fields (trust_id, minutes_type, meeting_date, participants)
PASS: AI integration with Claude generates professional WHEREAS/RESOLVED minutes format
PASS: Saved minutes integrate with existing minutes_records collection (source: 'guided_wizard')
PASS: Frontend stepper correctly tracks wizard progress with visual indicators
PASS: Form validation prevents proceeding without required fields
PASS: All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
PASS: Beta badge styling uses gold/gold-20 theme colors
seed_data_creation: Created test minutes record minutes_5216af3100b5 (annual meeting 2026-03-02)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Guided Minutes feature fully tested. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_guided_minutes.py. Key data-testids: guided-minutes-stepper, step-{1-4}-content, meeting-type-{annual|quarterly|general}, meeting-date-picker, participant-{name}, custom-participant-input, add-participant-btn, agenda-item-{n}, decision-item-{n}, add-agenda-btn, add-decision-btn, generate-draft-btn, draft-title, draft-body, regenerate-draft-btn, save-minutes-btn, view-minutes-btn, create-another-btn, back-to-minutes, prev-step-btn, next-step-btn. AI generation takes 10-15 seconds.

step_1_meeting_setup.validation: Requires meeting type + date + at least 1 participant

step_2_agenda_decisions.validation: Requires at least 1 agenda item or decision

navigation.next_button: Proceeds to next step when valid
